# ATS Fixture Directory

This directory is reserved for local mock ATS HTML fixtures used by Phase 7A-7D tests.

Rules:

- Use local static fixtures only.
- Do not depend on live ATS sites.
- Do not include real applicant data.
- Do not include cookies, session state, screenshots, or credentials.
- Do not add production Playwright workflows in Phase 7A.

Planned fixture groups:

```text
greenhouse/
lever/
generic/
workday/
uploads/
```
